arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Bodo/Glimt – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Norwegian outfit Bodo/Glimt in the first leg of their Europa League semi-final tonight. The Lilywhites advanced into the last four following a hard-fought away victory against Eintracht Frankfurt. Club captain Heung-min Son was absent for that trip to Germany and hasn’t recovered in time for tonight’s contest. The 32-year-old wasn’t spotted in […] The post Tottenham vs Bodo/Glimt – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.
